button.class: btn btn-light o_studio_ce_navbar_toggle_btn d-flex align-items-center gap-1 border rounded-pill px-3 py-1 me-2 shadow-sm
button.title: Toggle Studio CE
button.style: font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #714B67; border-color: rgba(113, 75, 103, 0.2); transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
